programs.name: Iran Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting Iran's nuclear proliferation, ballistic missile development, and support for terrorism, pursuant to multiple Executive Orders and the Iran Transactions and Sanctions Regulations.

programs.name: Russia Harmful Foreign Activities Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions related to Russia's harmful foreign activities including undermining democratic institutions, cyber-enabled activities, and the conflict in Ukraine, pursuant to E.O. 14024.

programs.name: Cuba Sanctions
programs.description: Comprehensive sanctions program targeting Cuba, administered under the Cuban Assets Control Regulations (CACR).

programs.name: North Korea Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting North Korea's weapons of mass destruction and ballistic missile programs, illicit financial activities, and human rights abuses.

programs.name: Specially Designated Global Terrorist
programs.description: Designations of foreign persons who have committed, or pose a significant risk of committing, acts of terrorism threatening U.S. national security.

programs.name: Specially Designated Narcotics Trafficker
programs.description: Designations of significant foreign narcotics traffickers and their organizations under the Foreign Narcotics Kingpin Designation Act.

programs.name: Syria Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting the Syrian regime and its supporters for human rights abuses, corruption, and destabilizing activities in the region.

programs.name: Venezuela Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting the Maduro regime in Venezuela for undermining democratic processes, human rights abuses, and corruption.

programs.name: Malicious Cyber-Enabled Activities Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting persons engaged in significant malicious cyber-enabled activities, including attacks on critical infrastructure and election interference.

programs.name: Global Magnitsky Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting perpetrators of serious human rights abuse and corruption worldwide under the Global Magnitsky Human Rights Accountability Act.

programs.name: Ukraine-Related Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions related to Russia's actions in Ukraine, targeting persons responsible for or complicit in actions undermining Ukraine's sovereignty.

programs.name: Transnational Criminal Organizations Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting significant transnational criminal organizations and their members, facilitators, and supporters.

programs.name: Western Balkans Stabilization Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting persons contributing to the destabilization of the Western Balkans region, including obstruction of the Dayton Accords.

programs.name: Yemen-Related Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting those threatening the peace, security, or stability of Yemen, including Houthi-affiliated actors.

programs.name: Chinese Military-Industrial Complex Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions addressing the threat posed by the military-industrial complex of the People's Republic of China, restricting U.S. investment in designated Chinese companies.
